title: Create: Ore Processing
description: Adds new processing chains for vanilla ores.
body:
# Overview
_This mod uses assets of [Create Ore Excavation](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation) and [Create Ore Excavation Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation-plus) under the MIT license_

This mod overhauls how Diamonds, Emeralds, Redstone, Lapis, and Netherite are aquired and processed, using mechanics from [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create). These ores each have their own unique processing chain, and are replaced by "raw ore" in chest, entity, and block loot pools.

## Requirements
- [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs)
- [LootJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootjs)
- [Kubeloader](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubeloader)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
